name: See You Tomorrow
overview: Ding Ning was single until she met Xiao Ye. The destined encounter also brought an extraordinary catastrophe... Time has always stayed on the day they met, which also happened to give Ding Ning the opportunity to understand and "strategy" Xiao Ye until the cycle of time was broken.

trailers.title: 《明天请你喜欢我See You Tomorrow》EP 01 trailer⏩我陷入时间循环了？！ | 陈名豪/姚童 | 优优青春剧场YoYo Fun Station
